name: @mediabubble/workspace
description: MediaBubble Nx monorepo — Egypt marketing, UAE clone, brand guidelines

scripts.dev:ae:clean: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf apps/web-ae/.next node_modules/.cache/webpack/apps/web-ae && find apps/web-ae/public -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name 'sw.js' -o -name 'workbox-*.js' -o -name 'swe-worker-*.js' -o -name 'fallback-*.js' \) -delete && nx run web-ae:dev
scripts.dev:eg:clean: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf apps/web-eg/.next node_modules/.cache/webpack/apps/web-eg && find apps/web-eg/public -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name 'sw.js' -o -name 'workbox-*.js' -o -name 'swe-worker-*.js' -o -name 'fallback-*.js' \) -delete && nx run web-eg:dev
scripts.dev:launcher:clean: lsof -ti :3003 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf apps/launcher/.next node_modules/.cache/webpack/apps/launcher && nx run launcher:dev
scripts.db:generate: sh -c 'set -a && . apps/launcher/.env.local && [ -f apps/launcher/prisma/.env ] && . apps/launcher/prisma/.env; set +a && prisma generate --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'set -a && . apps/launcher/.env.local && [ -f apps/launcher/prisma/.env ] && . apps/launcher/prisma/.env; set +a && prisma migrate dev --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:deploy: sh -c 'set -a && . apps/launcher/.env.local && [ -f apps/launcher/prisma/.env ] && . apps/launcher/prisma/.env; set +a && prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:deploy:ci: sh -c 'export DIRECT_URL="${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL}" && prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.vercel-build:launcher: sh -c 'export DIRECT_URL="${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL}" && prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma && nx build launcher'
scripts.db:studio: sh -c 'set -a && . apps/launcher/.env.local && [ -f apps/launcher/prisma/.env ] && . apps/launcher/prisma/.env; set +a && prisma studio --schema apps/launcher/prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:seed: sh -c 'set -a && . apps/launcher/.env.local && [ -f apps/launcher/prisma/.env ] && . apps/launcher/prisma/.env; set +a && tsx apps/launcher/prisma/seed.ts'
